caption:
You can't fake these smiles. Frost in the beard, snow down the collar, and another lap to go.

We keep the groups small on purpose — a handful of people, one guide, one mountain. The pace fits the group, nobody skis alone, and by day two the crew feels like old friends.

Most of our guests come solo or with one ski buddy. If that sounds like your kind of week, send us a message and we'll talk about next season.

#japow #hokkaido #backcountryskiing #skitouring #smallgroup #powderskiing #japanskiing
